expo.name: Territory
expo.description: Track runs, claim territory, and compete. Territory turns your running routes into claimable zones—run loops to capture areas, build your map, and challenge friends. Running app, GPS tracker, fitness.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Territory needs location to track your runs and show the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Territory uses location to record your run and claim territory.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Territory saves your activity share card to your photo library when you tap Save to photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Territory needs location to track your runs and show the map.
